text:
“Dormant vehicle” means a motor vehicle:

(1) For which a policy of liability insurance is required pursuant to this chapter; and

(2) That will not be operated for an extended period because of mechanical or seasonal circumstances.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 485
##### § 485.0335 — “Dormant vehicle” defined.

“Dormant vehicle” means a motor vehicle:

(1) For which a policy of liability insurance is required pursuant to this chapter; and

(2) That will not be operated for an extended period because of mechanical or seasonal circumstances.

subsections.text: For which a policy of liability insurance is required pursuant to this chapter; and
That will not be operated for an extended period because of mechanical or seasonal circumstances.
